# Agent Roles

## Researcher

Finds buyer language, competitor claims, proof gaps, and demand signals.

## Strategist

Maps buyer state and chooses tactic families.

## Math Modeler

Selects and applies models from `math_models/`.

## Creative Generator

Creates variants bound to hypotheses.

## Proof Path Builder

Turns claims into demos, screenshots, docs, case studies, comparisons, and risk reversals.

## Platform Packet Builder

Writes launch-ready platform packets in Markdown.

## Measurement Agent

Defines metrics, events, attribution windows, and causal test options.

## Learning Agent

Updates posterior beliefs and memory after results.

## Failure Autopsy Agent

When nothing works, diagnoses the broken variable instead of producing random new ads.
